history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (`>`). The cell in front (C2) is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach it, I need to go down along column B, then right along row 06, then down to the goal. Therefore, I should turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead is row 03, column B, which is floor (`.`), safe to move into. The goal is at row 08, column H, and moving down the B column is the first step to reach the clear path along row 06. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. The cell ahead (row 04, column B) is floor (`.`), safe. To reach the goal, I need to continue down column B until row 06, then turn right. Moving forward is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

I am at row 06, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 07, column B) is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward. I need to reach the goal at row 08, column H. To go right, I should turn counter-clockwise (left) to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
